title: taraxacum leontodon
intro: Taraxacum leontodon, commonly known as Lion's Tooth or Hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum leontodon include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum leontodon can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
